title: phyllanthus nobilis
intro: Phyllanthus nobilis, also known as Gong Xian Li or Chen Zi Ding, is a plant species within the family Phyllanthaceae, traditionally used in Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus nobilis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat liver and kidney disorders, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
